g.text: a tile atlas plus per-layer grid data become chunked geometry; layers add depth, markOccluders flags shadow casters
one gid per cell, per layer
each layer batched into chunkSize x chunkSize chunks (default 512)
smaller chunks = finer culling, more draw calls. larger = fewer calls,
coarser culling. getLayerAt(i), worldToTile / tileToWorld at runtime.
